Friday: Margaret opened with "Final review. Shot two locked, copy locked. Someone tell me what isn't right, because something..." - expecting problems. Saturday: This conversation contains no discussion of "Jalapeno Corn Dog Bites" - no ingredients, techniques, or food ideas were mentioned beyond a passing metaphor.
